bar_width.label: Bar width
bar_width.description: Thickness of each core's bar, in pixels.

bar_height.label: Bar length
bar_height.description: Length of each bar, in pixels. This is the height on a horizontal bar and the width on a vertical one.

warn_threshold.label: Warning threshold
warn_threshold.description: A core at or above this usage percentage is drawn in the warning colour.

normal_color.label: Bar colour
normal_color.description: Colour of a core below the warning threshold. Accepts a theme role such as primary, or a hex value.

warn_color.label: Warning colour
warn_color.description: Colour of a core at or above the warning threshold.

track_color.label: Track colour
track_color.description: Colour of the unfilled part of each bar, drawn at 15% opacity.

show_glyph.label: Show icon
show_glyph.description: Show a CPU icon to the left of the bars.
